name: drishvara-site
description: Initial website for Drishvara — a founder-led insight platform. First live trigger

scripts.refresh:homepage: node scripts/build-sports-context.js && node scripts/build-daily-context.js && node scripts/refresh-homepage.js && node scripts/fix-featured-images.js && node scripts/apply-bilingual-metadata.js && node scripts/build-seo.js
scripts.pipeline:live-preflight: npm run refresh:homepage && npm run publish:local-check && node scripts/pipeline-live-preflight.js --latest-drafts
scripts.pipeline:live-preflight:approved: npm run refresh:homepage && npm run publish:local-check && node scripts/pipeline-live-preflight.js --latest-drafts --require-approved
scripts.content:preflight: npm run publish:local-check && npm run bilingual:preflight && npm run hindi-body:preflight && npm run knowledge:preflight && npm run panchang:preflight && npm run subscriber-guidance:preflight && npm run submission:preflight && npm run daily-context:preflight && npm run sports-context:preflight && npm run seo:preflight && npm run supabase:schema:preflight && npm run auth-access:preflight && npm run dashboard:preflight && npm run submission-intake:preflight && npm run payment:preflight && npm run admin-review:preflight && npm run preactivation:preflight
